characters.name: Abner
characters.description: AbnerBasic InformationGenderMaleClassHumanStatusAliveRelationsAthena (love interest)SpecialtiesSprintingPhysical DescriptionHair ColorGreenEye ColorGreenProfessional StatusCountryCephiroAffiliation(s)LairyDebutMangaN/AAnimeN/AMediaOther MediaMagic Knight Rayearth (Sega Saturn) Abneris a character from theMagic Knight RayearthSega Saturn game. Abner is a young man with green eyes, and green hair with two yellow highlights. Abner prides himself on his sprinting and is willing to teach it to others. He is also flirtatious, trying to get a date withUmiif his students beat her in a footrace. According to one of Abner's students, however, Abner has a crush on the doctor Athena and is constantly trying to impress her.

characters.name: Ascot
characters.description: AscotName EtymologyKanjiアスコットRōmajiAsukottoBasic InformationGenderMaleClassPaluAge8 (Later physically 17)BirthdaySeptember 30thStatusActiveDeceased (OVA and Sega Saturn game)RelationsZagato (former employer)Caldina (caretaker)Umi (crush)LikesHis friendsUmiDislikesHis friends getting hurt or killedFavorite ColorGreenPhysical DescriptionHair ColorBrownEye ColorGreenHeightShort(Taller in season 2)Professional StatusCountryCephiroAffiliation(s)CephiroVoice ActorsJapanese VoiceMinami TakayamaEnglish VoiceMona Marshall Deceased (OVA and Sega Saturn game) Ascot(アスコット,Asukotto?)is a young child with the unusual ability to summon monsters (called a "Palu"), whom he considers to be his friends.

characters.name: Caldina
characters.description: CaldinaName EtymologyRōmajiカルディナBasic InformationGenderFemaleClassHumanStatusAliveDeceased (Sega Saturn game)RelationsLafarga (love interest)Physical DescriptionHair ColorPinkEye ColorBlueProfessional StatusCountryCephiroChizeta(formerly)OccupationDancerAssassinAffiliation(s)Zagato(formerly)DebutMangaChapter 7AnimeThe Birth of the Legendary Magic Knights!(shadow)The Legend of the Rune-Gods - In Cephiro, Another WorldMediaOther MediaSega Saturn gameVoice ActorsJapanese VoiceYuko NagashimaEnglish VoiceLenore Zann Deceased (Sega Saturn game) Chizeta(formerly) In the anime, she has great affection for Ascot, whom she treats as a naïve younger brother, and she joins him in deserting Zagato. Caldina also takes great pride in her skills as an entertainer and assassin. At first, her interests were shown as being purely mercenary, as Zagato was paying her to kill the Magic Knights. However, upon seeing the bondsFuuhad built withHikaruandUmi, Caldina admits to having been more affected by that than Zagato, whose motives she couldn't understand.

characters.name: Caltus
characters.description: CaltusBasic InformationGenderMaleClassHumanStatusAliveSpecialtiesSwimmingPhysical DescriptionHair ColorDark brownEye ColorDarkProfessional StatusCountryCephiroAffiliation(s)Taflon by the SeaPolizu Village (temporary)DebutMangaN/AAnimeN/AMediaOther MediaMagic Knight Rayearth (Sega Saturn) Polizu Village (temporary) Caltusis a character from theMagic Knight RayearthSega Saturn game. Caltus took pride in his swimming abilities but felt great remorse when he failed to save a young girl's beloved pet from the currents.

characters.name: Clef
characters.description: ClefName EtymologyKanjiクレフRōmajiKurefuAlso known asMaster Mage ClefBasic InformationGenderMaleAge745 years oldStatusActivePhysical DescriptionHair ColorSilverEye ColorLight BlueProfessional StatusCountryCephiroOccupationMaster MageAffiliation(s)CephiroVoice ActorsJapanese VoiceNozomu SasakiEnglish VoiceSteve Cannon (TV Series) Clef(クレフKurefu) is the chief of all sorcerers inCephiroand was formerlyPrincess Emeraude's attendant. Clef has the appearance of a handsome, if slightly intimidating, young boy of about ten or eleven years old, with light purple hair, light blue eyes, fair skin, and an aura of mystery and wonder. However, his appearance belied his age, as every individual of Cephiro has the ability to "will" how they look; he is actually seven-hundred-and-forty-five years old. His usual attire consists of long, elaborate white robes, a diadem studded with aquamarine gems and a large blue horn at the center, and gold earrings. He carries a staff almost twice his height, the top of which is carved into a strange animal and embedded with two large gemstones, the top being blue and the bottom purple. Clef projects his magic through the blue gemstone, which glows every time he casts a spell. Clef is known for his wisdom, mystique, and magical prowess. As the Guru, or rather Master Mage of Cephiro, he exudes an air of authority and knowledge. His demeanor is often calm and he carries himself with a certain elegance. Clef is dedicated to preserving the balance of Cephiro and guiding those who undertake important quests. His wisdom is a guiding light for the group, offering insights into the magical realm and the challenges they face. Despite his pragmatic nature, there's moments where a hint of humor or warmth shines through, especially when interacting with the main heroines. He has some temper , as seen by his habit of waving his staff when annoyed, showing occasional demonstrations of displeasure, such as when he comically knocks Umi in the head with his sff a when she called him a child. Though, he usually maintain a collected demeanor. He is loved by many characters including Umi (in the anime), but  he does not seem to express a particular interest in romantic relationships. During the second season, he struggles with guilt over his role in the girls' fate, specifically not revealing the truth about their destiny and the role of the knights. Ultimately, it was him who kept the truth from them, thereby sealing their foreordained fates.

characters.name: Debonair
characters.description: DebonairName EtymologyKanjiデボネアRōmajiDeboneaBasic InformationGenderFemaleStatusDeceasedRelationsNova(adopted daughter)Physical DescriptionHair ColorLight blueEye ColorBlueProfessional StatusCountryCephiroAffiliation(s)NovaAlcyoneDebutMangaN/AVoice ActorsJapanese VoiceAtsuko TakahataEnglish VoiceMelodee Spevack Alcyone Lady Debonair(デボネア,Debonea?)is the main antagonist of the second season ofMagic Knight Rayearth's anime adaptation who awaits the day whenCephirowill crumble due to lack of support fromPrincess Emeraude.

characters.name: Debonair
characters.description: DebonairName EtymologyKanjiデボネアRōmajiDeboneaBasic InformationGenderFemaleStatusDeceasedRelationsNova(adopted daughter)Physical DescriptionHair ColorLight blueEye ColorBlueProfessional StatusCountryCephiroAffiliation(s)NovaAlcyoneDebutMangaN/AVoice ActorsJapanese VoiceAtsuko TakahataEnglish VoiceMelodee Spevack Alcyone Lady Debonair(デボネア,Debonea?)is the main antagonist of the second season ofMagic Knight Rayearth's anime adaptation who awaits the day whenCephirowill crumble due to lack of support fromPrincess Emeraude.

characters.name: Eagle Vision
characters.description: Eagle VisionAnimeMangaName EtymologyKanjiイーグル・ビジョンRōmajiĪguru BijonBasic InformationGenderMaleClassHumanStatusActiveDeceased(Anime)RelationsHikaru Shidou(Love Interest)LikesTeatimeNapsDislikesThe current situation of AutozamFavorite FoodSweetsPhysical DescriptionHair ColorWhiteEye ColorMahoganyProfessional StatusCountryAutozamOccupationCommanderVoice ActorsJapanese VoiceMegumi OgataEnglish VoiceJerry GelbEagle Vision(イーグル・ビジョン,Īguru Bijon?)is the commander ofAutozam, a neighboring country ofCephiro, and is one of those who seek to become Cephiro's nextPillar. Naps Eagle is a tall and slender young man. He is very handsome and has always a smile on his face; his face is perfectly featured, framed with white-blond hair cut short. His eyes are different from the manga and the anime; he has golden eyes in the original version, while the anime adaptation made them hazel brown. In the manga, Hikaru notices how "beautiful and sad" his eyes were. Eagle's outfit is rather complicated, consisting of a long double layered cloak which hangs tightly from his shoulders because of the piece of armor that fixes it on; the lower part of his arm is encircled by a deadly laser weapon. He also wears a mechanic device on his forehead, which is able to convert mental energy to power. Eagle is an enigmatic and forceful tactician while at the same time a gentle and chivalrous gentleman. He is a calm, intelligent, and strategic individual. He is often seen as mysterious, keeping his true intentions hidden. Despite being introduced as an antagonist, he possesses a sense of honor and nobility. His interactions with the main characters, especially Hikaru, reveal a more compassionate and conflicted side to his character.

characters.name: Ferio
characters.description: FerioName EtymologyKanjiフェリオRōmajiFerioBasic InformationGenderMaleClassHumanStatusActiveRelationsPrincess Emeraude(Older Sister)Fuu Hououji(Love Interest)LikesSleepDislikesNot Enough SleepPhysical DescriptionHair ColorGreenEye ColorGoldHeight5'2"Professional StatusCountryCephiroDebutAnimeEpisode 3Voice ActorsJapanese VoiceTakumi YamazakiEnglish VoiceTerry RobertsSpanish VoiceUlysses Cuadra Ferio(フェリオFerio) is a warrior whom the Magic Knights first meet in theForest of Silence. A tough young man wielding a sword taller than he is, he quickly develops a soft spot forFuu, which by the second season has evolved into love. Never completely honest with others, he made himself difficult for the heroines to trust. He appears as a tough young man with short green hair in a low ponytail. He has golden eyes, wears small gold earrings, and dresses in a wardrobe typical to the villagers of Cephiro. His only armor is a single metal plate on his left shoulder. Also of note are his facial scars, one over the bridge of his nose and an X-shaped scar on his left cheek. Ferio is carefree, cheerful, clever, and disingenuous. He behaves somewhat like a mercenary, but he always keeps his promises and is very brave.
characters.personality_section: Ferio is carefree, cheerful, clever, and disingenuous. He behaves somewhat like a mercenary, but he always keeps his promises and is very brave.

characters.name: Fuu Hououji
characters.description: Fuu HououjiRegularFull ArmorOVAName EtymologyKanji鳳凰寺 風RōmajiHōōji FūMeaningWind of Phoenix TempleBasic InformationGenderFemaleClassHumanAge14BirthdayDecember 12Star SignSagittariusBlood TypeBStatusActiveRelationsFatherMotherKuu Hououji(Older Sister)Ferio(Love Interest)Favorite FoodSushiLeast Favorite FoodYucky FoodsFavorite ColorGreenFavorite SubjectMathLeast Favorite SubjectArtHobbyReading BooksSpecialtiesComputer ProgrammingExtracurricular ActivitiesArchery ClubWants to be...Systems EngineerPhysical DescriptionHair ColorBronze(anime)Brown(OVA)Blonde(manga and 2026 anime)Eye ColorGreenHeight155cm / 5'1"Professional StatusCountryJapanOccupationMagic KnightMagicWinds of HealingEmerald TyphoonWinds of AdmonishmentWinds of ProtectionEmerald CycloneDebutAnimeThe Birth of the Legendary Magic Knights!Voice ActorsJapanese VoiceHiroko Kasahara(Original)Rie Takahashi(2026 anime)English VoiceRuby Marlowe(TV Series)Lisa Ortiz(OVA) Fuu Hououji(鳳凰寺風,Hōōji Fū) is one of the three main protagonists of theMagic Knight Rayearthmanga and anime series. She is theMagic Knightthat represents the wind element. Fuu has chin-length sandy blond hair that has short bangs hanging on either side, green eyes, and round glasses. Fuu is always smiling and appears calm, polite, and gentle, though she is also awkwardly blunt. She often says bluntly obvious or absurd things with a bright smile, unintentionally making her honesty hilarious, for Umi's annoyance. One of her greatest strengths is her ability to think logically and plan strategically. From the beginning, she remains composed instead of panicking and carefully analyzes what is happening around her. She has strong morals, endless curiosity, and a love for RPGs and nerdy things. Despite that, Fuu’s intelligence is more book smart than street smart. Her experience in her school’s archery club makes her highly skilled with a bow and arrow, which becomes her first weapon. Later, she receives a massive sword of Escudo that is so heavy no one but Fuu herself can lift it. Fuu falls in love withFerio, the estranged brother of Princess Emeraude, who has been helping them since they met in theForest of Silence. In the second arc, she grows closer to Ferio, and although she is torn knowing she helped kill his sister, his feelings for her never waver. In the second season of the anime, Fuu wins an archery contest against Lady Aska, after which they become friends. Despite her rational mind, she believes that her faith along with Hikaru’s and Umi’s, is her true strength in saving Cephiro. Though she sometimes doubts herself, she always regains her resolve and comes out stronger in the end.

She often says bluntly obvious or absurd things with a bright smile, unintentionally making her honesty hilarious, for Umi's annoyance. One of her greatest strengths is her ability to think logically and plan strategically. From the beginning, she remains composed instead of panicking and carefully analyzes what is happening around her. She has strong morals, endless curiosity, and a love for RPGs and nerdy things. Despite that, Fuu’s intelligence is more book smart than street smart. Her experience in her school’s archery club makes her highly skilled with a bow and arrow, which becomes her first weapon. Later, she receives a massive sword of Escudo that is so heavy no one but Fuu herself can lift it. Fuu falls in love withFerio, the estranged brother of Princess Emeraude, who has been helping them since they met in theForest of Silence. In the second arc, she grows closer to Ferio, and although she is torn knowing she helped kill his sister, his feelings for her never waver. In the second season of the anime, Fuu wins an archery contest against Lady Aska, after which they become friends. Despite her rational mind, she believes that her faith along with Hikaru’s and Umi’s, is her true strength in saving Cephiro. Though she sometimes doubts herself, she always regains her resolve and comes out stronger in the end.

characters.name: Hikaru Shidou
characters.description: Hikaru ShidouRegularFull ArmorOVAName EtymologyKanji獅堂 光RōmajiShidō HikaruMeaningLight of the Lion ShrineBasic InformationGenderFemaleClassHumanAge14BirthdayAugust 8Star SignLeoBlood TypeOStatusActiveRelationsSatoru Shidou(Older Brother)Masaru Shidou(Older Brother)Kakeru Shidou(Older Brother)Hikari(Pet)Lantis(Love Interest)Eagle Vision(Love Interest)Favorite FoodIce Cream and ChocolateLeast Favorite FoodAnything SpicyFavorite ColorRedFavorite SubjectBiologyLeast Favorite SubjectMusicHobbyPlaying with her dog HikariSpecialtiesKendo, talking to animalsExtracurricular ActivitiesKendo ClubWants to be...A dog trainerPhysical DescriptionHair ColorCrimson(anime)Dark Red(OVA)Pink(manga and 2026 anime)Eye ColorRedHeight145 cm / 4'9"Professional StatusCountryJapanOccupation8th Grade StudentMagic KnightPillar of CephiroMagicFlame ArrowRuby LightningDebutAnimeThe Birth of the Legendary Magic Knights!Voice ActorsJapanese VoiceHekiru Shiina(Original)Ayana Sakura(2026 anime)English VoiceJulie Maddalena(TV Series)Tara Sand(OVA) Hikaru Shidou(獅堂光,, Shidō Hikaru?)is one of the three main protagonists ofMagic Knight Rayearth. She is theMagic Knightthat represents the fire element. Hikaru Shidou was born in Tokyo, Japan, to a kendo instructor father and his wife, and has three older brothers:Satoru,Masaru, andKakeru.  During her kindergarten year, Hikaru beat her father in a swordfight, which led to her father going on a training journey from which he has yet to return[1]. She lived in a Dojo or a temple with her brother's who were quite protective of her. Hikaru Shidou is brave, cheerful,  spirited, affectionate  and humble girl with a tomboy-ish disposition.  She gets excited with little things and has the strongest will among the trio. As the Knight of Fire, she is innocent and empathetic, yet possesses immense bravery and skill in kendo. While sometimes naive, she is a deeply loyal friend who matures through the journey, ultimately choosing to fight against the tragic Pillar system to create a better future. Empathetic, Hikaru possesses a deep capacity for compassion, resilience and forgiveness, often trying to understand her enemies motivations rather than simply fighting them. That aside, she developed deep trauma after the guilt of killingEmeraude, becoming introspective and more melancholic. In the anime she repressed her trauma creating a darker twin calledNova. Hikaru also has a deep love for animals, as shown in her bond with her dog, and desire to take care and connect with Cephiro creatures, her dream in earth was  to be a dog trainer. Reflecting her Kendo skills, her  magic weapon is a sword made fromEscudo, her weapon would turn into flames if touched by anyone but herself.

characters.name: Innouva
characters.description: InnouvaName EtymologyKanjiイノーバRōmajiInōbaBasic InformationGenderMaleStatusDeceasedPhysical DescriptionHair ColorWhiteEye ColorGoldProfessional StatusCountryCephiroOccupationZagato's Right HandAffiliation(s)CephiroVoice ActorsJapanese Voice(Okiayu Ryoutarou)English Voice(Terrance Stone) Innouva(イノーバ,Inōba?)is an anime-only character sporting an elven appearance and manner. Innouva is the advisor and loyal servant ofZagato. However, he has a very limited role, and his past is mostly unknown. He was a devoted servant of Zagato's, though originally he was in fact a birthday present from Emeraude to her High Priest. Innouva is not humanoid as he appears, but an animal-shaped elemental of lightning who assumed a human form to better serve his new master. His true form resembles a giant wolf with two tendrils streaming from its head. His weak spot proved to be the gemstone embedded in his forehead in either form. He first challenged the Magic Knights in the Sky Shrine, and would have defeated them if not forWindam's revival. He later resumed his true form and was killed byHikaru.

characters.name: Kuu Hououji
characters.description: Kuu HououjiMangaAnimeBasic InformationGenderFemaleClassHumanRelationsFuu Hououji(Younger sister)Professional StatusCountryJapan Kuu Hououji(鳳凰寺 空Hououji Kuu) isFuu's older sister. Kuu is a young woman with green eyes, and long brown hair flowing down her back, two locks of which are braided. In her brief appearances, Kuu is seen wearing a green dress with puffed sleeves. From what little is seen of Kuu, she cares about Fuu very much. She is also known to like the chick pastries sold at Tokyo Tower.

characters.name: Lady Aska
characters.description: Lady AskaMangaAnimeName EtymologyKanji阿洲花Basic InformationGenderFemaleClassHumanAge10BirthdayMarch 20thStatusAliveLikesMischiefSanyunFavorite FoodSteamed peach bunsPhysical DescriptionHair ColorBlackEye ColorBlueProfessional StatusCountryFahrenOccupationPrincess of FahrenVoice ActorsJapanese VoiceChinami NishimuraEnglish VoiceSandy Fox Sanyun Lady Aska(阿洲花) is the princess of the country ofFahrenand the head of the Fahren invasion force that attacksCephiroin Part 2. Her ship is the Dreamchild (theDomein the anime), an immense dragon-shaped vessel. Aska is initially quite arrogant; she laughs constantly and boastfully, and tends to refer to herself with the "royal we" instead of "I." She is also quite immature and shallow at first, wanting to be Cephiro'sPillarso that her every whim will become reality like turning the entire world of Cephiro into 'sweets' etc and, in the anime, she also wants to become pretty to impressSanyun. However, she ultimately makes a self-reflection on her decision of invading Cephiro and becoming the Pillar and decides to gives up this desire due to her love for Fahren and its people.

characters.name: Lantis
characters.description: LantisAnimeMangaName EtymologyKanjiランティスRōmajiRantisuBasic InformationGenderMaleClassHumanStatusActiveRelationsZagato(Older Brother, Deceased)Eagle Vision(Close Friend)Hikaru Shidou(Love Interest)LikesNapsDislikesSweetsPhysical DescriptionHair ColorBlackEye ColorAzureProfessional StatusCountryCephiroOccupationCail(Magic Swordsman)Voice ActorsJapanese VoiceJūrōta KosugiEnglish VoiceLex Lang Lantis(ランティス,Rantisu?)is a powerfulCailorKairu(Magic Swordsman) who journeyed abroad and returned toCephiroin the second part ofMagic Knight Rayearth. Lantis Lantis is a serious and stoic man, as well as someone of few words, and he is described byMokonaas having "the strongest heart of all the people of Cephiro." Initially, Lantis was regarded with suspicion and fear, particularly fromLafarga, due to his reclusive nature and the timing of his return, but it was ultimately revealed that he did not want Zagato andPrincess Emeraude's tragic story to repeat itself indicating how much he values his personal connections with everyone as shown in the flashback that he was genuinely approachable and friendly until the tragic situation with Zagato and Emeraude's yearning for love overwhelmed him. Lantis also shows a great capacity for compassion and emotional receptions, stating that he does not blameHikaruortheotherMagic Knightsfor the death of his brother, blaming instead the Pillar system.

Lukino is an aged magician with white hair and beard.

characters.name: Masaru Shidou
characters.description: Masaru ShidouBasic InformationGenderMaleStatusAliveRelationsSatoru Shidou(older brother)Kakeru Shidou(younger brother)Hikaru Shidou(younger sister)Professional StatusCountryJapan Kakeru Shidou(younger brother)Hikaru Shidou(younger sister) Masaru Shidou(獅堂 優,Shidou Masaru) is a minor supporting character inMagic Knight Rayearth.

characters.name: Mira
characters.description: MiraBasic InformationGenderFemaleClassHumanStatusAliveRelationsUnnamed motherProfessional StatusCountryCephiroDebutMangaN/AAnimeAlcyone, the Vengeful Sorceress Mirais a young girl who appears in the anime adaptation ofMagic Knight Rayearth. In Season One,Hikarusaves her when her village is attacked by a monster. She expresses her gratitude by leaving a flower for Hikaru before being taken away by her mother.

characters.name: Mokona
characters.description: MokonaName EtymologyKanjiモコナRōmajiMokonaBasic InformationGenderMaleStatusActivePhysical DescriptionHair ColorWhiteProfessional StatusCountryCephiroAffiliation(s)Magic KnightsDebutAnimePresea, The Master Smith In The Forest Of SilenceVoice ActorsJapanese VoiceYuri ShiratoriEnglish VoiceKaeko Sakamoto Mokona(モコナ,Mokona?)is a supporting character ofMagic Knight Rayearththat is also featured in many CLAMP crossovers. Mokona resembles a bunny at most, white and fluffy with long ears and feet. It's noted byFuuthat he is seemingly elastic and bouncy. A red circular gem adorns his forehead, though during certain moments, it has glowed blue, green, or yellow. He does not have paw pads, but rather a singular pink pad on his feet and paws. He also has a small tail, which mostly goes unnoticed unless being viewed from behind. Cute, affectionate, and mischievous, Mokona is the perfect adventure companion. He assistedHikaru,Umi, and Fuu on their quest to become Magic Knights, and was there for their every need, except during battle. Using the gem on his forehead, Mokona magically provided for the girls' needs during their quest, such as shelter (or more accurately, a miniature hotel room), food, and transportation. He genuinely cares for the girls, expressing sadness and concern for their wellbeing on their quests. Despite running away from battles with monsters, Mokona did bravely sacrifice himself to save Hikaru from being captured by the monster made of light, which had already gotten Umi and Fuu. Mokona is best known for being mischievous; he frequently teases Umi, and the fairyPrimerawhenever she'd try to interfere withLantisand Hikaru. An observation about how Mokona's behavior changes throughout both seasons, he starts off as cute and chirpy like a wild animal, and transitions to being cute and easygoing. Mokona seemed to get well along withPresea, as Presea jokingly teases Mokona about how she'd punish him when she discovered him making a mess of her study, either by seeing how far his ears could stretch or hanging him by his feet.

Despite running away from battles with monsters, Mokona did bravely sacrifice himself to save Hikaru from being captured by the monster made of light, which had already gotten Umi and Fuu. Mokona is best known for being mischievous; he frequently teases Umi, and the fairyPrimerawhenever she'd try to interfere withLantisand Hikaru. An observation about how Mokona's behavior changes throughout both seasons, he starts off as cute and chirpy like a wild animal, and transitions to being cute and easygoing. Mokona seemed to get well along withPresea, as Presea jokingly teases Mokona about how she'd punish him when she discovered him making a mess of her study, either by seeing how far his ears could stretch or hanging him by his feet.
characters.personality_section: Cute, affectionate, and mischievous, Mokona is the perfect adventure companion. He assistedHikaru,Umi, and Fuu on their quest to become Magic Knights, and was there for their every need, except during battle. Using the gem on his forehead, Mokona magically provided for the girls' needs during their quest, such as shelter (or more accurately, a miniature hotel room), food, and transportation. He genuinely cares for the girls, expressing sadness and concern for their wellbeing on their quests. Despite running away from battles with monsters, Mokona did bravely sacrifice himself to save Hikaru from being captured by the monster made of light, which had already gotten Umi and Fuu. Mokona is best known for being mischievous; he frequently teases Umi, and the fairyPrimerawhenever she'd try to interfere withLantisand Hikaru. An observation about how Mokona's behavior changes throughout both seasons, he starts off as cute and chirpy like a wild animal, and transitions to being cute and easygoing. Mokona seemed to get well along withPresea, as Presea jokingly teases Mokona about how she'd punish him when she discovered him making a mess of her study, either by seeing how far his ears could stretch or hanging him by his feet.
